# {{ .Title }}

{{- with .Params.description }}
{{ . }}
{{- end }}
{{- $pages := where .RegularPages "Draft" "!=" true }}
{{- range ($pages.GroupBy "Section") }}
{{- if ne .Key "" }}
## {{ .Key | title }}
{{- end }}

- [{{ .Title }}]({{ .Permalink }}){{ with .Description }}: {{ . }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
